$schema._comment: Pilot locale (ja-JP). Mirrors every translatable key from en-US.json. Brand names (RigPlane, Tower, rigctld, Hamlib, CI-V) and radio abbreviations (VFO, CW, SSB, USB, LSB, AM, FM, DATA, TX, RX, RIT, XIT, DSP, MHz, kHz, Hz, dB, dBm, etc.) MUST stay verbatim in English even inside Japanese sentences. Per-locale reserved terms follow strategy glossary §2.D ja-JP: callsign=コールサイン, squelch=スケルチ, band plan=バンドプラン. Polite form (です/ます) throughout. Half-width digits, Latin letters and units; full-width Japanese punctuation. See ../CONTRIBUTING.md.
